ComparisonOperator.description: Comparison operators. Supports standard threshold alerting: >, >=, <, <=, !=, =, as well as the following period-over-period alerting: last_period_increase_pct: Increased compared to last period. last_period_decrease_pct: Decreased compared to last period. last_period_abs_pct: Increased or decreased compared to last period. last_day_increase_pct: Increased compared to the same period yesterday. last_day_decrease_pct: Decreased compared to the same period yesterday. last_day_abs_pct: Increased or decreased compared to the same period yesterday. last_week_increase_pct: Increased compared to the same period last week. last_week_decrease_pct: Decreased compared to the same period last week. last_week_abs_pct: Increased or decreased compared to the same period last week.

MetricName.description: Monitoring metric name. For details, see MetricName for each product in Cloud Monitoring Metric Query.

MetricUnit.description: Unit of the monitoring metric. For details, see MetricUnit for each product in Cloud Monitoring Metric Query. For period-over-period alerting, MetricUnit must be set to "Percent." Whether IEC is included in MetricUnit indicates different base values: With IEC: base is 1024; Without IEC: base is 1000.

Period.description: Statistical period for monitoring metrics. For details, see Period for each product in Cloud Monitoring Metric Query.

Statistics.description: Statistical method. Options: avg: average, max: maximum, min: minimum. The statistical method is applied to data within the detection time period. For example, the default detection time span is 1 minute. If the statistical method is avg, the average value of data within 1 minute is used.

Threshold.description: Metric threshold. Supports positive numbers or 0. Up to three decimal places allowed.

MetaCondition.description: Condition for selecting alert objects based on resource name. Required when Type is meta.

ProjectCondition.description: Condition for selecting alert targets by project. Required when Type is project.

TagCondition.description: Condition for selecting alert objects by tag. Required when Type is tag.

Type.description: Dimensions type. Values: project: Select alert targets by project. tag: Select alert targets by tag. meta: Select alert targets by resource name.

Comparator.description: Tag match operator. contain: Contains not_contain: Does not contain prefix_match: Prefix match suffix_match: Suffix match equal: Equals not_equal: Does not equal exist: Exists.

Values.description: Tag value (Value). When Comparator is exist, includes all Values corresponding to the Key and does not support input. When Comparator is equal or not_equal, supports multiple Value inputs. When Comparator is contain, not_contain, prefix_match, or suffix_match, only one Value can be entered.

Level.description: Alert notification level. Options: notice: notification, warning: warning, critical: critical, recovery: recovery.

AllDimensions.description: Whether all resources are included. true: All resources. false: Partial resources.

Condition.description: Condition. and: All conditions met. or: Any condition met.

Metas.description: Condition. and: All conditions met. or: Any condition met.

Enable.description: Enable no data alert. Values: true: enable no data alert. false (default): disable no data alert.

EvaluationCount.description: No data alert trigger threshold. If no data is reported within the configured threshold period, a no data alert will be triggered. When Enable is set to true, this field is required. Integer format; value range is 3–20.

Channel.description: Notification channel. Options: email: Email sms: SMS phone: Phone feishu: Feishu dingtalk: DingTalk wecom: WeCom slack: Slack api: Callback URL.

NotifyTemplateId.description: Notification template ID. Note: Each notification channel supports only one notification template ID.

Key.description: Metric Dimension name, such as ResourceID, NodeName, etc. Dimension names vary by cloud product. For details, see Cloud Monitoring Metric Query. ResourceID is required, and its capitalization must match Cloud Monitoring Metric Query. Supports multiple Dimension names and grouping by multiple Dimension names. For example: If you only enter ResourceID, the system groups alerts by ResourceID. If you enter both ResourceID and NodeName, the system first groups alerts by ResourceID, then groups within each ResourceID group by NodeName.

Values.description: Metric Dimension values, in array format. Separate multiple values with commas. Wildcard * can be used to select all instance values. For example: ["*"] .

Projects.description: Project name list, in array format. Separate multiple values with commas.

Enable.description: Enable alert recovery notification. Options: true: (default) enable alert recovery notification, false: disable alert recovery notification.

Key.description: Tag key. Supports Chinese, uppercase and lowercase English letters, numbers, and spaces. The following special characters are supported: _ . : / = + - @. Cannot start or end with a space. volc: and /sys: are system-reserved tag keys. When adding a tag, the tag key cannot start with any case form of volc: or /sys:. Tag key length must be 1–128 characters.

Value.description: Tag value. Supports Chinese, uppercase and lowercase English letters, numbers, and spaces. The following special characters are supported: _ . : / = + - @. Cannot start or end with a space. Tag key length must be 0–255 characters.

Condition.description: Condition. and: All conditions met. or: Any condition met.

Tags.description: Tag list. Supports up to 10 tag lists. Tag value cannot exceed 50 characters.

description: If you need to monitor the data status of a cloud product resource, you can create a cloud monitoring alert policy. When the monitored resource data meets the alert trigger conditions, the system will send alert notifications using your specified method, helping you quickly identify resources with abnormal data.

AlertMethods.description: Alert notification method. Email: email, Phone: phone, SMS: SMS, Webhook: webhook callback.

AlertState.description: Alert status. alerting: In alert; normal: Normal.

ConditionOperator.description: Multi-metric determination condition. &&: Alert is triggered only if all metrics meet the condition; ||: Alert is triggered if any metric meets the condition.

Conditions.description: Alert conditions. Array format; supports multiple metric evaluation statements, up to 10.

ContactGroupIds.description: Alert notification group ID bound to the alert policy.

CreatedAt.description: Alert policy creation time, in timestamp format.

EffectEndAt.description: Policy expiration time, in HH:MM format.

EffectStartAt.description: Policy start time, in HH:MM format.

EnableState.description: Alert policy status. enable: enabled, disable: disabled

EvaluationCount.description: Duration required to trigger an alert, in minutes.

Level.description: Alert level. critical: critical, warning: warning, notice: notification

MultipleConditions.description: Does the alert policy use multiple metrics? true: multiple metrics, false: single metric (default).

Namespace.description: Cloud product associated with the monitoring metric. For details, see Namespace for each product in Cloud Product Monitoring Metrics.

OriginalDimensions.description: Resource ID detected by the alert policy.

ProjectName.description: Project to which the alert policy belongs.

Regions.description: Availability zone ID of the cloud product.

ResourceType.description: Resource type detected by the alert policy.

RuleType.description: Alert policy type. static: manual selection, dynamic: select by resource name, project, and tag.

SilenceTime.description: Alert sending interval, in minutes. Supported values: 5, 10, 15, 30, 60, 180, 360, 720, 1440.

SubNamespace.description: Dimension of the metric referenced by this policy. For details, see SubNamespace for each product in Cloud Product Monitoring Metrics.

UpdatedAt.description: Alarm policy update time, in timestamp format.

Webhook.description: Alarm callback URL bound to the alarm policy.

WebhookIds.description: Alarm callback ID list when an alarm occurs.
